Class Player

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.players.Player
Direct Known Subclasses:
AIPlayer, HumanPlayer
public abstract class Player extends Object
Abstract base class representing a player in Clue! Can be extended by HumanPlayer or AIPlayer.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

    • name

      private String name

      private String token

    • row

      private boolean active

      private Room currentRoom

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name, String token, int startRow, int startCol)
      Constructs a player with a name, token and starting position.
      Parameters:
      name - the player's name
      token - the player's token identifier
      startRow - starting row on the board
      startCol - starting column on the board

  • Method Details

    • takeTurn

      public abstract void takeTurn(Board board, Dice dice, List<Player> allPlayers)
      Takes a turn — handles movement for this player. Implemented differently by Human (console input) and AI (random/strategic) players.
      Parameters:
      board - the game board
      dice - the dice to roll for movement
      allPlayers - all players in the game (for corridor occupancy checks)

    • makeSuggestion

      public abstract Suggestion makeSuggestion()
      Makes a suggestion. The room must be the room the player is currently in. Returns null if the player chooses not to suggest or is not in a room.
      Returns:
      a Suggestion, or null if none made

    • makeAccusation

      public abstract Accusation makeAccusation()
      Makes an accusation. Returns null if the player chooses not to accuse. A wrong accusation eliminates the player from active play.
      Returns:
      an Accusation, or null if none made

    • chooseSuggestionCard

      public abstract Card chooseSuggestionCard(List<Card> matchingCards, String askerName)
      Called when this player must disprove a suggestion and holds one or more matching cards. The player chooses which card to reveal to the suggester.
      Parameters:
      matchingCards - the cards in this player's hand that match the suggestion
      askerName - the name of the player who made the suggestion
      Returns:
      the card chosen to reveal

    • seeDisprovalCard

      public abstract void seeDisprovalCard(Card card, String fromPlayerName)
      Called when another player shows this player a card to disprove a suggestion. Human players see the card printed; AI players record it in their notepad.
      Parameters:
      card - the card being shown
      fromPlayerName - the name of the player showing the card

    • addCard

      public void addCard(Card card)
      Adds a card to this player's hand.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to add

    • getMatchingCards

      public List<Card> getMatchingCards(Suggestion suggestion)
      Returns all cards in this player's hand that match a suggestion. A card matches if its name equals the suspect, weapon or room name.
      Parameters:
      suggestion - the suggestion to check against
      Returns:
      list of matching cards (may be empty)

    • moveTo

      public void moveTo(int row, int col)
      Moves the player to a new position on the board.
      Parameters:
      row - the new row
      col - the new column

    • enterRoom

      public void enterRoom(Room room)
      Places the player inside a room. The player's grid position stays at the door they entered through but they are considered inside the room.
      Parameters:
      room - the room to enter

    • leaveRoom

      public void leaveRoom()
      Removes the player from their current room so they can move through corridors again.

    • getName

      public String getName()

    • getToken

      public String getToken()

    • getRow

      public int getRow()

    • getCol

      public int getCol()

    • getHand

      public List<Card> getHand()

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()

    • setActive

      public void setActive(boolean active)

    • getCurrentRoom

      public Room getCurrentRoom()
